heading: Liability of master, mate, engineer, and pilot
label: 30103 Liability of master, mate, engineer, and pilot
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3010346 App.:491 (words after semicolon).R.S. § 4493 (words after semicolon).Before paragraph (1), the words “bring a civil action” are substituted for “sue” for consistency with rule 2 of the Federal Rules of Civil Procedure (28 App. U.S.C.). In paragraph (1), the word “carelessness” is omitted as included in “negligence”.

children.text: neglect or refusal to obey the laws governing the navigation of vessels.
